---
title: User Guide
---

This user guide covers the functional components of `hexkit` — providers, test
utilities, and observability tools — alongside the architectural concepts that guide
its development, with example code and guidance on when to use each feature.

- [Architecture Concepts](arch_concepts/overview.qmd)
- [Library Structure and Conventions](structure/overview.qmd)
- [Protocols](protocols/overview.qmd)
- [Providers](providers/overview.qmd)
- [Observability Tools](observability_tools/overview.qmd)
- [Developer Help](developer_help/overview.qmd)
- [Glossary](glossary/index.qmd)
